parameters.content:
## [Admin] Run Ragas Eval v2.0.0

**Trigger:** POST /caiac/admin/eval
**Auth:** HMAC + Authorization: Bearer token
**Access:** is_caiac_staff=true only
**Body:** { client_id: slug }

Inserts a job record into caiac.eval_jobs, then fires a non-blocking POST
to the async eval endpoint (returns 202 immediately).

Returns 202 with { job_id, status: "running" }.
Poll job status via GET /caiac/admin/eval/status?job_id={job_id}

**Service:** ragas_api.py (FastAPI) on port 8000 via systemd (ragas-api.service)
**Async endpoint:** http://172.18.0.1:8000/ragas/eval/async
**Per-client prereq:** /opt/caiac/eval_data/{client_id}.json must exist.

parameters.query:
SELECT id, webhook_secret
FROM caiac.clients
WHERE slug = '{{ $('Receive Eval Request').item.json.body.client_id }}'
LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ timestamp: $('Receive Eval Request').item.json.headers['x-caiac-timestamp'], signature: $('Receive Eval Request').item.json.headers['x-caiac-signature'], signing_key: $('Receive Eval Request').item.json.headers.authorization.replace('Bearer ', '').trim(), secret: $('Get Webhook Secret').first().json.webhook_secret }) }}

parameters.query:
SELECT s.user_id, s.role, s.client_id, s.expires_at,
       u.name, u.email, u.active as user_active, u.is_caiac_staff,
       c.slug, c.active as client_active
FROM caiac.sessions s
JOIN caiac.users u ON s.user_id = u.id
JOIN caiac.clients c ON s.client_id = c.id
WHERE s.token = '{{ $('Check HMAC Valid').item.json.token }}'
AND s.expires_at > NOW()
AND u.active = true
AND c.active = true
LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO caiac.eval_jobs (client_id)
SELECT id FROM caiac.clients
WHERE slug = '{{ $('Receive Eval Request').item.json.body.client_id }}'
RETURNING id::text AS job_id
